meanings.definition: adapt (a wild plant or unclaimed land) to the environment
overcome the wildness of; make docile and tractable
examples: He tames lions for the circus

meanings.definition: make fit for cultivation, domestic life, and service to humans
examples: The horse was domesticated a long time ago
The wolf was tamed and evolved into the house dog

meanings.definition: converted or adapted to domestic use

examples: some men think it unmanly to be domesticated; others find gratification in it
